name: kodr
description: A one-shot coding harness for local LM Studio models
author: Paul Kohler

scripts.check: node --check bin/*.mjs && node --check src/*.mjs && node --check src/tools/*.mjs
scripts.format: biome format --write bin src test eval specs *.md *.json
scripts.format:check: biome format bin src test eval specs *.md *.json
